hero.trust: ★★★★★ 5.0 · CPO Certified · Licensed & Insured · Founding 25 — First Month Free
hero.h1: Book pool & hot tub service in Vancouver — we handle the rest.
hero.lead: Weekly cleanings, spring openings, winter closes, and emergency green-pool help. Pick a time that works for you. After every visit you get a PureFlow Report — what we did, your water readings, and a photo.

why.h2: You want to enjoy the pool — not manage it.
why.card1Title: Vancouver weather is hard on pools
why.card1Text: Rain, debris, and algae don't wait for weekends. Consistent professional care beats expensive crisis calls every time.
why.card2Title: We're local, reliable, and easy to book
why.card2Text: Same-day confirmation for most requests. Weekly clients get a standing appointment — your pool is ready when you are.
why.card3Text: Year-round hot tub care keeps your spa ready in every season — not an afterthought bolted onto pool service.

services.sub: Fixed-price packages — no hourly guessing on routine maintenance.
services.weeklyMicro: Most chosen in Kitsilano & Point Grey
services.weeklyDesc: Full pool maintenance through the season plus winter checks. Chemicals, cleaning, and equipment inspection — handled.
services.spaDesc: Year-round hot tub balance, filter care, and shell cleaning. Keep your spa crystal clear through every Vancouver winter.
services.seasonDesc: Professional start-up and winterization so your system survives BC winters. Book both early and save.
services.recoveryDesc: Cloudy or green water? Flat-fee treatment with a follow-up check included. Members get trip fee waived.
services.comboDesc: One route stop, one report, one bill. Save $59/month vs separate plans.

report.h2: Your pool's health record — after every single visit.
report.p: No surprises. No "trust us." Just clear documentation you can keep for warranty, resale, or peace of mind.
report.li4: Photo of your pool or spa
report.heroNotesHtml: Actions taken: Added 450g dichlor · Brushed walls & steps · Cleared skimmer & pump baskets · Vacuumed debris · Equipment check — all normal.
report.heroPhotoAlt: Crystal-clear backyard pool after a Pure Flow service visit

pricing.sub: Chemicals included within fair-use limits on all PureCare plans. All prices + GST.
pricing.weeklyDesc: Active summer pools · Apr–Oct visits + winter checks
pricing.comboDesc: Pool + spa on the same property
pricing.fine: *Fair-use chemical allowance per visit. 12-month PureCare agreements with auto-pay. Founding 25: first month free + free Equipment Health Check at sign-up.

compare.h2: Pure Flow vs. the usual pool guy
compare.sub: Most homeowners can't tell if service actually happened. We fix that.

perks.p2Text: No dispatch charge on Pure Recovery calls.
perks.p3Text: Seasonal bundle discount for active subscribers.
perks.p4Text: $175 for members ($225 regular) — pump, filter, heater review.

steps.s1Text: Weekly care, opening, closing, or green-pool help — tell us when works best (morning or afternoon).
steps.s2Text: You'll hear back within 4 business hours with your confirmed visit window. No hourly surprises — flat monthly rates.
steps.s3Title: We show up — you don't wait around

steps.s4Title: Enjoy your pool — we send proof

area.p: From the West Side and North Shore to Burnaby and Richmond — real routes, real technicians. Book online for Vancouver, West Vancouver, and North Vancouver.
area.captionHtml: Weekly routes · West Side & North Shore · Book online · Open in Maps · Schedule service
area.noteHtml: Book online — we confirm your visit window within 4 business hours. Schedule service

reviews.r1Quote: Finally a pool company that actually tells you what they did. The PureFlow Report after every visit is a game changer — I don't have to wonder if someone showed up.
reviews.r2Quote: Our hot tub runs perfectly through the winter now. They treat the spa as seriously as the pool. Worth every penny on the combo plan.
reviews.r3Quote: Green pool after a trip away — fixed in three days, flat fee, no surprises. Signed up for weekly service the same week.
reviews.founderH3: Built for Vancouver homeowners who expect proof, not promises
reviews.founderP: Certified pool & spa operator serving the West Side and North Shore. Pure Flow is a neighbourhood service — book online, get a confirmed window, and receive a documented report after every visit.

faq.q1: How fast can I get an appointment?
faq.a1: Most bookings are confirmed within 4 business hours. Green or cloudy water requests are prioritized — often same-day or next-day on the West Side and North Shore.
faq.q2: Do you service hot tubs only?
faq.a2: Yes. PureCare Spa runs year-round on weekly or bi-weekly plans. Many clients add spa care to their pool plan with our Combo package.
faq.q3: Are chemicals included in the monthly price?
faq.a3: Yes — all PureCare plans include chemicals up to a fair-use allowance per visit. If your pool needs unusually heavy treatment (e.g. after a storm or neglect), we'll discuss any overage before proceeding.
faq.q4: What if my pool turns green?
faq.a4: Our Pure Recovery service handles cloudy and green water at flat-fee pricing starting at $295. PureCare members get the trip fee waived. We include a follow-up check within 72 hours.
faq.q5: Do I need to be home for service?
faq.a5: No. After the first visit, gate codes or lockbox access work perfectly. We'll note your access details when we confirm your booking.
faq.q6: When should I book my spring opening?
faq.a6: March through April is ideal. Book early — especially before March 15 — to secure your preferred slot and the $895 open + close bundle rate.
faq.a7: Minor repairs like seals and O-rings, yes. Major electrical or gas heater work is referred to licensed partners we trust. We'll always diagnose honestly.
faq.q8: Do you service strata or commercial pools?
faq.a8: Our launch focus is residential. If you manage a strata or commercial property, join our waitlist — we're expanding in Phase 2.

book.lead: Pick a service and a time that works. We'll confirm your visit within 4 business hours — usually the same day for urgent green-pool calls.

book.successText: We'll confirm your exact visit window within 4 business hours. Check your email for next steps.
